features.name: bundle_subfield_annotation_with_fieldID_and_nonlocal
features.description: Code should include an annotation on a bundle type subfield using fieldID to target a specific field, combined with a circt.nonlocal reference to a NonLocalAnchor
features.snippet: firrtl.wire sym @b {annotations = [#firrtl.subAnno<fieldID = 2, {circt.nonlocal = @nla_1, three}>]} : !firrtl.bundle<baz: uint<1>, qux: uint<1>>

features.name: nla_with_multiple_innerNameRef_spanning_modules
features.description: Code should include a NonLocalAnchor (NLA) declaration with an array of innerNameRef references that span multiple module boundaries

features.name: instance_with_symbol_and_nonlocal_annotation
features.description: Code should include a firrtl.instance declaration with a symbol and a nonlocal annotation referencing a NonLocalAnchor

features.name: wire_with_symbol_and_subfield_annotation
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with a symbol and an annotation targeting a specific subfield of a bundle type using fieldID
features.snippet: %b = firrtl.wire sym @b {annotations = [#firrtl.subAnno<fieldID = 2, {circt.nonlocal = @nla_1, three}>]} : !firrtl.bundle<baz: uint<1>, qux: uint<1>>
